creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 239276
v1 (apply via "git am")

"poudriere bulk -t" is OK on 12.3 i386, 13.1 amd64/i386, 14.0 amd64.

Doesn't seem to work when run standalone (outside of Plasma).

$ kwin_wayland --exit-with-session obs
[...]
xdp-kde-screencast: CreateSession called with parameters:
xdp-kde-screencast:     handle:  "/org/freedesktop/portal/desktop/request/1_23/obs1"
xdp-kde-screencast:     session_handle:  "/org/freedesktop/portal/desktop/session/1_23/obs1"
xdp-kde-screencast:     app_id:  ""
xdp-kde-screencast:     options:  QMap()
xdp-kde-screencast: zkde_screencast_unstable_v1 does not seem to be available
